DeltaE_c_note: DeltaE_c_Ha is the full interacting-core excitation energy E_core(hole in c) - E_core(ground state), a many-electron total-energy difference -- NOT a bare orbital-eigenvalue difference.
atomic_data_note: u_c(r)=r*R_c(r) normalized so integral u_c^2 dr = 1; V_H_c is the single-core-orbital Hartree potential.
